message:
Enhance PromptCard with difficulty, basket, and animations

- Add difficulty indicator with Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced icons
- Add add-to-basket button with useBasket hook integration
- Add ring highlight for items in basket
- Implement framer-motion staggered fade-in animations
- Add hover lift effect with motion.div wrapper
- Expand tags display from 3 to 4

Closes jeffreysprompts.com-xje

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
